title: Phase 3: Table (Core CRUD + File Persistence + QoL)
description: Implement Table with PK-based storage, GSI maintenance, file-backed persistence via atomic writes, and quality-of-life features: count, describe, validation, export, event hooks. See Vision.md for full details.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Status: in progress. Did: kicked off Phase 3 implementation. Next: set child stories in_progress and implement Table core + steps (Python/Rust). Blockers: none.
